title: Bloomberg:中國下一目標係海底通訊電纜

replies.msg:
China’s Next Naval Target Is the Internet’s Underwater Cables

Worried about Huawei’s 5G? Wait till it gets into the game for 95 percent of all data and voice traffic.

https://www.bloomberg.com/opinion/articles/2019-04-09/china-spying-the-internet-s-underwater-cables-are-next

大意：
全世界95%資訊靠海底電纜
華為已經建造或改善100條電纜
驚佢做手腳，或從電纜外部偷資料

早排都有新聞講過
澳洲都即刻閘住咗
但我想知如果有人偷偷潛落去改裝可以點發現到？
